subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon spotted three wolves chained in the cave but passed them undetected.
source_quote: Zenvon spotted three wolves chained in the cave but passed them undetected

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon approached a rubble-choked passage and came face-to-face with a giant coiled poisonous snake.
source_quote: As Zenvon approached the passage, he came face-to-face with a giant coiled poisonous snake

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon had a stealth roll of 23 which meant the snake had not yet noticed him.
source_quote: Thanks to his stealth roll of 23, the snake had not yet noticed him

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon decided to slowly tiptoe back to the party.
source_quote: Decided to slowly tiptoe back to the party

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela is a dwarf who has darkvision.
source_quote: Sister Maela (dwarf) and Veyra (tiefling) do

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra is a tiefling who has darkvision.
source_quote: Sister Maela (dwarf) and Veyra (tiefling) do

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra possesses a blue candle that provides light.
source_quote: Veyra's blue candle provides light

subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren is currently held by captors who may kill him if they stop extracting information.
source_quote: Gundren's captors will eventually stop trying to extract information from him and may kill him

subject: Sister Garaele
fact: Sister Garaele returned to town wounded and is not speaking about what happened.
source_quote: Sister Garaele returned to town wounded and is not speaking about what happened

subject: Halia
fact: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange and has an unclear relationship with the Red Brands.
source_quote: Halia at the Phandalin Miners Exchange has not been visited, and her relationship with the Red Brands is unclear

subject: Carp Alderleaf
fact: Carp Alderleaf discovered a hidden tunnel.
source_quote: Investigate the hidden tunnel discovered by Carp Alderleaf

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath offers boots of striding and springing for investigating Old Owl Well and the undead threat.
source_quote: earn the boots of striding and springing from Daran Edermath

subject: Glasstaff
fact: Glasstaff is the leader of the Red Brands gang.
source_quote: their leader Glasstaff not yet confronted

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands gang continues to operate freely in Phandalin.
source_quote: The Red Brands gang continues to operate freely in Phandalin

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands maintain a safehouse at Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: with their safehouse at Tresendar Manor

subject: wolves
fact: Three wolves are chained inside the cave.
source_quote: three wolves chained in the cave

subject: giant poisonous snake
fact: A giant coiled poisonous snake was discovered blocking a passage inside the cave.
source_quote: giant coiled poisonous snake

subject: cave
fact: The cave contains a main passage deeper inside that requires darkvision or a light source to navigate.
source_quote: A main passage deeper into the cave was identified, but it required either darkvision or a light source to navigate

subject: cave
fact: The cave contains a rubble-choked passage.
source_quote: scouting toward a rubble-choked passage

subject: Tresendar Manor
fact: Tresendar Manor serves as the safehouse for the Red Brands.
source_quote: their safehouse at Tresendar Manor

subject: Phandalin Miners Exchange
fact: Halia is located at the Phandalin Miners Exchange.
source_quote: Halia at the Phandalin Miners Exchange

subject: Shrine of Luck
fact: An acolyte at the Shrine of Luck is waiting to give a quest after Gundren is rescued.
source_quote: Return to the Shrine of Luck acolyte after rescuing Gundren

subject: Old Owl Well
fact: Old Owl Well is a location associated with an undead threat and a reward of boots of striding and springing.
source_quote: Investigate Old Owl Well and the undead threat

subject: blue candle
fact: Veyra's blue candle provides light but would compromise stealth.
source_quote: Veyra's blue candle provides light but would compromise stealth

subject: boots of striding and springing
fact: The boots of striding and springing are a reward for investigating Old Owl Well.
source_quote: earn the boots of striding and springing

subject: black stone obelisk fragments
fact: There is a threat of someone assembling the black stone obelisk fragments.
source_quote: The threat of someone assembling the black stone obelisk fragments remains an unresolved background danger

subject: snake encounter
fact: Zenvon came face-to-face with a giant coiled poisonous snake.
source_quote: he came face-to-face with a giant coiled poisonous snake

subject: retreat
fact: Zenvon retreated silently from the snake to end the session.
source_quote: Zenvon retreating silently from the snake

subject: Gundren's rescue
fact: The rescue of Gundren is time-sensitive due to threats from his captors.
source_quote: making the rescue time-sensitive

subject: Sister Garaele's injury
fact: Sister Garaele's injury and the events leading to it remain unresolved.
source_quote: her situation remains unresolved

subject: Halia's connection
fact: Halia's connection to the Red Brands is unclear and requires investigation.
source_quote: her relationship with the Red Brands is unclear

subject: obelisk threat
fact: The assembly of the black stone obelisk fragments remains an unresolved background danger.
source_quote: remains an unresolved background danger
